decisions.summary: Source of truth = .pan/backlog/sequence.md (repo-tracked markdown, auto-committed via queueAutoCommit). SQLite backlog_sequence is a disposable cache, fully rebuildable from the md.

The Sequencer runs as a tmux-hosted role agent via spawnRun(runId,'sequencer',{agentId:'sequencer-runner',...}), mirroring spawnFlywheelAgent (src/lib/cloister/flywheel.ts:117). There is NO direct-LLM-API path for role runs in this codebase; all roles are tmux Claude sessions.

Chunked map-reduce (NFR-6) is realized INSIDE the agent session: the backlog input gives a compact manifest + a batched body accessor; the prompt instructs the agent to read issue bodies in batches against a running shortlist, never inlining all 522 bodies in one prompt. Incremental reads only the prior sequence.md + changed bodies.

New configurable role 'sequencer' (default workhorse:expensive -> claude-opus-4-8) added to Role union (agents.ts), DEFAULT_MODEL_REFS + DEFAULT_ROLES (config-yaml.ts), and the RolesPanel.tsx ROLES array; model resolved at spawn via determineModel({role:'sequencer'}) -> resolveModel -> derefWorkhorse.
Reuse the existing vBRIEF DAG stack (ReactFlow 11 + @dagrejs/dagre, TB layout) from PlanDAG.tsx for the new Backlog page; new IssueNode component, zero new viz dependency (NFR-2).

in-pipeline is computed server-side from review_status (non-pending) OR live workspace/branch/agent presence, mirroring derivePipelineState's inputs; derivePipelineState itself is a frontend helper and must NOT be imported into the server.

Operator pickup gate 'blocked' reuses the existing parked-label mechanism (BLOCKER_LABELS in src/lib/cloister/auto-merge-eligibility.ts) so the existing Flywheel skip honors it immediately; no parallel hold system.

On-demand pass buttons (Creation/Incremental/Review) are the acceptance-critical MVP. The debounced delta auto-trigger + periodic review cadence is the lowest-priority bead (follow-up wire-up) and may land last per the PRD ('not a blocker').

Three orthogonal per-issue axes replace needs-design/needs-discussion: planning policy {skip/auto/interactive} = how to plan; pickup gate {auto/ready/blocked} = whether/when the Flywheel may pick; condition {ok/needs-refinement/stale} = state of the issue itself. A legacy parked label reads as planning:interactive.

hazards.summary: NFR-6 context window: the full open backlog is ~370k tokens (522 issues x ~715 tok) and exceeds one context window. A Creation/Review pass that inlines all bodies in one prompt will blow the window.
hazards.mitigation: collectOpenBacklog returns a compact manifest + a batched body accessor; roles/sequencer.md forbids inlining the whole backlog and mandates batched reads against a running shortlist; a chunking test asserts N bodies -> K batches, not 1.

hazards.summary: NFR-5 file-size budget: naive triplicated rationale (table + prose + JSON) reaches ~120k tokens for 522 issues.
hazards.mitigation: Store rationale once: full paragraph only for the active top tier (~80), one-line why (<=140 chars) for the tail; writer enforces; a footprint test asserts <= ~65k tokens at 522 nodes.

hazards.summary: FR-14 Flywheel executor must keep the existing author/assignee security filter so it never picks an unsolicited third-party issue when reading from the sequence.
hazards.mitigation: Reuse the existing security filter in flywheel.ts; explicit AC asserts a security-filtered issue is never selected; review.security verifies.

hazards.summary: Pinned in-pipeline issues must never be re-ranked/re-ordered/rewritten across re-sequences; only their live flags/condition refresh.
hazards.mitigation: roles/sequencer.md instructs read-but-never-rewrite for the pinned set; incremental-preserve test asserts a pinned issue keeps rank/rationale when a sibling moves.

hazards.summary: Operator-owned fields (gate, planning) and operator-sourced edges must survive every re-sequence verbatim; an AI pass must not clobber them.
hazards.mitigation: Parser/writer round-trip preserves them; sequencer prompt copies operator fields/edges verbatim and only re-derives github-ref / recomputes ai-inferred edges; round-trip + preserve tests.

hazards.summary: queueAutoCommit only commits when the current branch is main (auto-commit.ts checks branch==main). sequence.md is a main-side runtime artifact written by the sequencer agent, distinct from THIS feature's implementation which lands via the normal feature-branch review pipeline.
hazards.mitigation: Follow the drafts.ts/specs.ts precedent (they queueAutoCommit and the debounced flush gates on main); do not assume sequence.md commits from inside a feature worktree.

hazards.summary: derivePipelineState lives in the frontend (issuePipelineState.ts); importing frontend code into the Effect server would break the build.
hazards.mitigation: Compute in-pipeline server-side from review_status + workspace/agent signals; do not import the frontend helper into routes/backlog.ts.

hazards.summary: SQLite schema bump must be forward-only and additive; breaking earlier migrations or existing tables corrupts the cache DB for all projects.
hazards.mitigation: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS in initSchema + an additive `if (currentVersion < 57)` migration block; bump SCHEMA_VERSION 56->57; drop-and-rebuild equivalence test.

sessionHistory.note: Auto-planning session for PAN-1866 Backlog Sequencer. Verified all PRD codebase references; decomposed the 8 PRD work items into 19 beads; recorded spawn-mechanism and chunking decisions (D2/D3) as the main inferred architecture choices.

VERIFICATION FAILED for PAN-1866 (attempt 1/10):

Failed check: sync-target-branch

Sync with main FAILED — merge conflicts detected:

Merge conflicts with main:
  - src/cli/index.ts
  - src/dashboard/server/read-model.ts

## REQUIRED: Resolve merge conflicts BEFORE resubmitting

1. Run: `git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main`
2. Resolve all conflicts in the listed files
3. Run the project's build and tests to verify nothing broke
4. Commit and push ALL changes

After fixing:
1. Run the project's build and tests
2. Commit and push ALL changes
3. ONLY THEN resubmit: pan review request PAN-1866 -m "Fixed sync-target-branch"

Do NOT resubmit until all repos sync cleanly and tests pass.
